description_long: This is a horizontally oriented, cylindrical metal storage tank with a weathered, industrial appearance. The tank features two prominent circular access hatches or manways on its top surface, each fitted with a bolted cap and a small, raised dome, likely for venting or pressure relief. The surface of the tank is mottled with signs of rust and aging, giving it a rugged, utilitarian look typical of outdoor or industrial storage vessels. The tank rests on two sturdy metal support brackets, elevating it slightly above the ground. One side of the tank displays a faint yellow warning symbol, suggesting the contents may be hazardous or require caution. The overall construction is robust, with no visible access ladders or external piping, emphasizing its function as a secure, standalone storage unit.
description: A weathered, cylindrical metal storage tank with two bolted top hatches and support brackets, showing signs of rust and a warning symbol on one side.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full cylindrical body, both top hatches, and support brackets clearly; the warning symbol is faintly visible.
description_view_1: Side view showing the circular end of the tank and the alignment of the two top hatches in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with both hatches visible but the warning symbol less prominent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other circular end and the top hatches in profile, mirroring view 1.
